if(NOT IREE_ROCM_TEST_TARGET_CHIP MATCHES "^gfx")
  return()
endif()

iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    backends
  SRCS
    "backends.cc"
  DEPS
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::cts::util::registry
    iree::hal::drivers::amdgpu::registration
  TESTONLY
  ALWAYSLINK
  PUBLIC
)

iree_hal_cts_testdata(
  FORMAT_NAME
    amdgpu
  TARGET_DEVICE
    "amdgpu"
  IDENTIFIER
    "iree_cts_testdata_amdgpu"
  BACKEND_NAME
    "amdgpu"
  FORMAT_STRING
    [=["amdgcn-amd-amdhsa"]=]
  TESTDATA_DIR
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/runtime/src/iree/hal/cts/testdata"
)

iree_hal_cts_test_suite(
  BACKENDS_LIB
    ::backends
  LABELS
    "driver=amdgpu"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
)
